## Checklist

- [ ] A **person** authored and reviewed this change (not an automated or unguided agent).
- [ ] I built it locally and it runs.
- [ ] The change is focused and matches the surrounding code style.
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, per the DCO).
